headline: A Look At Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation After Its Accelerate 2026 SecOps And FortiOS 8.0 Launch
summary: Fortinet (FTNT) just used its Accelerate 2026 conference to spotlight fresh SecOps capabilities and launch FortiOS 8.0, putting AI governance, quantum-safe security, and SASE or SD-WAN growth firmly in focus for investors. See our latest analysis for Fortinet. Despite the product news and conference buzz, Fortinet’s recent share price return has been relatively muted. The stock has recorded a 4.56% 90 day gain and a 7.07% year to date move at a share price of US$83.39, while the 1 year total...
